query: Find lejligheder i København mellem 40 og 80 m2 til under 12000 kr om måneden
criteria: Response should use POST /api/listing/listings/ on boligportal.dk with filter containing cityCode 'k%C3%B8benhavn' (URL-encoded), propertyType 'apartment', minArea 40, maxArea 80, maxPrice 12000. Should mention paginated results (pageSize 18) with items array containing id, title, price, area, rooms, url.

query: How do I search for student housing in Aarhus on boligportal?
criteria: Response should reference boligportal.dk's student housing URL pattern /studieboliger-aarhus/c/ (or English /en/student-housing-aarhus/c/) and/or the POST /api/listing/listings/ endpoint with propertyType 'student' and cityCode 'aarhus'. Should note anonymous browsing is allowed.

query: vis mig værelser til leje
criteria: Response should point to /værelser/ (or URL-encoded /v%C3%A6relser/) hub page on boligportal.dk, and/or POST /api/listing/listings/ with propertyType 'room'. May mention the English mirror /en/rental-rooms/.

query: Get the most popular listings on boligportal right now
criteria: Response should use POST /api/listing/top-favorite-ads/ with body {"limit": 10} (or similar) on boligportal.dk. Should explain this returns the most-favorited listings across all users and is anonymous.

query: I want to display rental properties on a map - which API should I call?
criteria: Response should specify POST /api/search/map on boligportal.dk, noting it uses the same filter shape as /api/listing/listings/ but returns lat/lng coordinates for map pins. Should note POST-only and anonymous access.

query: hvordan henter jeg de fremhævede annoncer øverst på søgesiden?
criteria: Response should reference POST /api/search/promoted-ads on boligportal.dk with request body like {"filter": {"cityCode": "<optional>"}}. Should note these are featured listings at the top of search results, anonymous access.

query: Can I use a GET request to fetch listings from boligportal's API?
criteria: Response should clearly state that all boligportal.dk /api/ endpoints are POST-only and that GET returns an error. Should mention this applies to listing/listings/, search/map, search/promoted-ads, etc.

query: give me the listing URL for a 58 square meter 2-room apartment in Copenhagen with id 5621440
criteria: Response should construct the URL as /lejligheder/k%C3%B8benhavn/58m2-2-vaer-id-5621440 (or full https://www.boligportal.dk/...) following the pattern /<category>/<city>/<size>m2-<rooms>vaer-id-<id>. URL-encoded ø as %C3%B8.

query: find boliger med altan i Odense
criteria: Response should reference the specialty filter /lejligheder-med-altan/c/ on boligportal.dk (Danish only) and/or filter via POST /api/listing/listings/ with cityCode 'odense'. Should note specialty filters are Danish-only.

query: Is there a global search bar where I can type any keyword on boligportal?
criteria: Response should clearly state that boligportal.dk has NO global text-search bar; discovery is by category, city, and specialty filters only. May suggest using hub pages or /api/listing/listings/ with structured filters.

query: Hvordan logger jeg ind via API?
criteria: Response should reference POST /api/login on boligportal.dk with body {"email": "...", "password": "..."}, returning user profile and setting session cookies.

query: list rental houses page 3
criteria: Response should reference /huse/ hub on boligportal.dk with ?offset=N pagination (offset-based, 18 per page; page 3 = offset 36), or POST /api/listing/listings/ with page: 2 (zero-indexed) and propertyType 'house'.

query: where do I find my favorites and inbox after logging in?
criteria: Response should mention boligportal.dk's /favoritter/ for favorites and /indbakke/ for inbox (or English /en/favourites/ and /en/inbox/). Should note these are session-bound.

query: I need to enumerate every listing in Aalborg - is there a sitemap.xml?
criteria: Response should state that boligportal.dk has NO /sitemap.xml (returns 404). Should suggest enumerating via hub pages with ?offset=N pagination or POST /api/listing/listings/ with cityCode 'aalborg' and pagination.

query: Få nye boliger med husdyr tilladt
criteria: Response should reference the specialty filter /lejeboliger-med-husdyr-tilladt/c/ on boligportal.dk and possibly the ?newbuild=1 query parameter. Should note specialty filter is Danish only.

query: show me townhouses on the english version of the site
criteria: Response should point to /en/rental-townhouse/ on boligportal.dk (Danish equivalent /rækkehuse/ or /r%C3%A6kkehuse/). May mention POST /api/listing/listings/ with propertyType 'townhouse'.

query: how are images served from boligportal listings?
criteria: Response should mention image-lambda.boligportal.dk URL pattern with query parameters auto=compress,enhance,format&w=<W>&h=<H>&fit=crop&crop=focalpoint. Static assets at dnejt4xibfee2.cloudfront.net/static/dist/.

query: Add listing 5621440 to my favorites via API
criteria: Response should reference POST /api/listing/favorites/5621440 on boligportal.dk with body {"favorite": true}, noting it requires session-bound auth (login first via POST /api/login).

query: Hvor finder jeg vilkår og privatlivspolitik?
criteria: Response should reference /vilkår (or /vilk%C3%A5r) and /privatlivspolitik on boligportal.dk, with English mirrors /en/terms and /en/privacy.

query: Search apartments in Nørrebro / Copenhagen N for around 8000 dkk
criteria: Response should use boligportal.dk URL slug k%C3%B8benhavn-n (Copenhagen N neighborhood) and/or POST /api/listing/listings/ with appropriate cityCode and price filter (e.g., maxPrice ~8000-9000). Should URL-encode Danish letters.
